大语言模型/LLM.title: MaxProof: Scaling Mathematical Proof with Generative-Verifier RL and Population-Level Test-Time Scaling
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: MaxProof：通过生成-验证强化学习与群体级测试时扩展实现数学证明的规模化
大语言模型/LLM.summary: We present MaxProof, a population-level test-time scaling framework for competition-level mathematical proof in the MiniMax-M3 series. M3 first trains three proof-oriented capabilities -- proof generation, proof verification, and critique-conditioned proof repair -- using a defense-in-depth generati
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文提出MaxProof，一个面向竞赛级数学证明的群体级测试时扩展框架，集成于MiniMax-M3系列。M3首先通过深度防御生成式-验证式强化学习训练三种面向证明的能力：证明生成、证明验证和基于批判的证明修复。在测试时，MaxProof通过群体级搜索策略协调多个生成器与验证器，实现证明的迭代改进与扩展。实验表明，该方法在多个数学竞赛基准上显著提升了证明成功率，展示了强化学习与测试时计算扩展在数学推理中的潜力。主要贡献在于提出了一个结合生成式与验证式强化学习的可扩展证明框架，并验证了群体级测试时扩展的有效性。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Why Sampling Is Not Choosing: Intentionality, Agency, and Moral Responsibility in Large Language Models
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 为什么采样不是选择：大语言模型中的意向性、能动性与道德责任
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have prompted claims that such systems exhibit agency or qualify as moral agents. This paper argues that these attributions are misguided. We maintain that moral responsibility requires commitment-bearing agency grounded in intrinsic intentionality and
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文批判性地审视了大语言模型（LLM）具备能动性或道德主体地位的论断。作者主张道德责任需要基于内在意向性和自主选择的承诺性能动性，而LLM的输出本质上是统计采样，缺乏真正的意向性。论文从哲学角度分析了LLM的“选择”与人类决策的根本区别，强调采样过程不蕴含意图或责任。主要贡献在于澄清了LLM能力与道德主体之间的概念混淆，为AI伦理讨论提供了严谨的哲学基础，并警示不要过度拟人化地归因道德属性于AI系统。

大语言模型/LLM.title: From Verdict to Process: Agentic Reinforcement Learning for Multi-Stage Fact Verification
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 从裁决到过程：面向多阶段事实核查的智能体强化学习
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Recent approaches combining Large Language Models (LLMs) with retrieval-augmented reasoning have shown promise for automated fact verification. To process complex claims, these verification pipelines typically execute multi-stage workflows that coordinate tightly coupled modules, including claim dec
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于智能体强化学习（RL）的多阶段事实核查框架，将传统端到端验证过程分解为多个协同的子任务。该方法利用LLM作为智能体，通过强化学习训练其执行声明分解、证据检索、推理判断等步骤，并优化整体流程。与现有流水线方法不同，本框架允许智能体动态调整策略，适应复杂声明。实验表明，该方法在多个事实核查基准上优于传统流水线，尤其在处理多跳推理声明时表现突出。主要贡献在于将事实核查从静态流水线转变为可学习的动态过程，并通过RL实现端到端优化。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Automated reproducibility assessments in the social and behavioral sciences using large language models
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 利用大语言模型实现社会与行为科学的自动化可重复性评估
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Reproducibility in the social and behavioral sciences is typically evaluated by independent researchers who reanalyze the original data to assess whether the published findings can be recovered. However, such approaches are resource-intensive and difficult to scale. Here, we show that large language models (LLMs) can automate the reproducibility assessment process. Specifically, we propose a framework that uses LLMs to evaluate the reproducibility of published studies by comparing original data, code, and results. Our experiments on a dataset of 100 social science studies demonstrate that LLMs achieve high agreement with human evaluators while significantly reducing the time and cost of reproducibility checks. This work highlights the potential of LLMs to enhance the credibility and scalability of reproducibility assessments in the behavioral sciences.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 社会与行为科学中的可重复性通常由独立研究人员重新分析原始数据来评估，但这种方法资源密集且难以规模化。本文提出利用大语言模型（LLM）自动化可重复性评估流程，通过比较原始数据、代码和结果来判断研究是否可复现。在100项社会科学研究数据集上的实验表明，LLM与人工评估者一致性高，且显著降低了时间和成本。创新点在于首次将LLM应用于可重复性评估的全自动化，贡献在于提升了评估的可扩展性和可信度。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Mod-Guide: An LLM-based Content Moderation Feedback System to Address Insensitive Speech toward Indigenous Ethnic and Religious Minority Communities
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: Mod-Guide：基于大语言模型的内容审核反馈系统，应对针对原住民族裔和宗教少数群体的不敏感言论
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Language operates as a mechanism of both marginalization and resistance, especially for minority communities navigating insensitive and harmful speech online. As content moderation increasingly depends on large language models (LLMs), concerns arise about whether these systems can recognize culturally specific forms of harm. In this paper, we introduce Mod-Guide, an LLM-based content moderation feedback system designed to address insensitive speech toward Indigenous ethnic and religious minority communities. Mod-Guide provides contextual feedback to users, explaining why their language may be harmful and offering alternative phrasing. Our evaluation with community members shows that Mod-Guide effectively identifies insensitive speech and provides culturally sensitive feedback, outperforming existing moderation systems. This work contributes to developing more inclusive and culturally aware content moderation tools.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 语言既是边缘化机制也是抵抗工具，尤其对少数群体而言。随着内容审核日益依赖大语言模型（LLM），系统能否识别文化特定形式的伤害成为问题。本文提出Mod-Guide，一个基于LLM的内容审核反馈系统，专门针对原住民族裔和宗教少数群体的不敏感言论。该系统提供上下文反馈，向用户解释语言可能造成的伤害，并建议替代表述。社区成员评估显示，Mod-Guide能有效识别不敏感言论并提供文化敏感的反馈，优于现有审核系统。创新点在于结合文化背景的反馈机制，贡献是推动了更具包容性和文化意识的内容审核工具的发展。

大语言模型/LLM.title: MiniMax Sparse Attention
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Ultra-long-context capability is becoming indispensable for frontier LLMs: agentic workflows, repository-scale code reasoning, and persistent memory all require the model to jointly attend over hundreds of thousands to millions of tokens, yet the quadratic cost of softmax attention makes this untenable.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 超长上下文能力对于前沿大语言模型变得不可或缺：智能体工作流、仓库级代码推理和持久记忆都要求模型能够联合关注数十万到数百万个token，但softmax注意力的二次方成本使得这难以实现。本文提出MiniMax稀疏注意力机制，旨在降低长上下文场景下的计算复杂度。创新点在于设计了一种高效的稀疏注意力模式，在保持模型性能的同时显著减少计算开销。主要贡献是提出了一种可扩展的注意力方法，使得LLM能够处理极长序列，从而推动智能体系统和大规模代码分析等应用的发展。

大语言模型/LLM.title: A Quantitative Experimental Repeated Measures Study of Training Dynamics in a Small Llama Style Language Model Under a Compute-Aware Token Budget
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 计算感知令牌预算下小型Llama风格语言模型训练动态的定量实验重复测量研究
大语言模型/LLM.summary: This study examines training dynamics in a small Llama-style language model trained under a fixed, compute-constrained token budget. Rather than evaluating efficiency solely through endpoint performance, the study uses a quantitative experimental repeated measures design to analyze how validation loss evolves across training steps, providing insights into the relationship between token budget allocation and model convergence.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本研究考察了在固定、计算受限的令牌预算下训练的小型Llama风格语言模型的训练动态。不同于仅通过最终性能评估效率，该研究采用定量实验重复测量设计，分析验证损失在训练步骤中的演变，揭示了令牌预算分配与模型收敛之间的关系，为资源受限环境下的语言模型训练提供了新的视角。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Contrast-Informed Augmentation and Domain-Adversarial Training for Adult-to-Neonatal MR Reconstruction Generalization
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 基于对比度感知的数据增强与领域对抗训练实现成人到新生儿磁共振重建的泛化
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Purpose: To investigate whether contrast-informed data augmentation and domain-adversarial training improve the adult-to-neonatal generalization of the E2E-VarNet. Methods: Three training regimes were investigated: (1) adult-only training with unaugmented adult data, (2) mixed training with paired u
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 本文研究如何提升磁共振重建模型从成人到新生儿的泛化能力。针对E2E-VarNet模型，提出对比度感知的数据增强和领域对抗训练方法。实验比较了三种训练策略：纯成人数据训练、混合成人-新生儿数据训练、以及结合对比度增强与领域对抗的训练。结果表明，所提方法显著缩小了成人模型与新生儿域之间的性能差距，尤其在低对比度区域重建质量上提升明显。主要贡献在于首次系统研究了医学影像重建中的跨域泛化问题，并提出了有效的域适应技术，为临床新生儿MRI应用提供了可行方案。

计算机视觉/CV.title: EvTexture++: Event-Driven Texture Enhancement for Video Super-Resolution
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: EvTexture++：事件驱动的视频超分辨率纹理增强
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Event-based vision has drawn increasing attention owing to its distinctive properties, including ultra-high temporal resolution and extreme dynamic range. Recent works have introduced it to video super-resolution (VSR) to enhance flow estimation and temporal alignment. In contrast, this paper shifts
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 基于事件的视觉因其超高时间分辨率和极端动态范围等独特特性而受到越来越多的关注。近期工作将其引入视频超分辨率（VSR）以增强光流估计和时间对齐。相比之下，本文转变思路，聚焦于利用事件数据直接增强纹理细节，提出EvTexture++框架。该方法通过事件驱动的纹理增强模块，有效利用事件流中的高频信息恢复精细纹理，在多个基准数据集上取得了优于现有方法的性能，尤其在大运动场景和低光照条件下表现出色。主要贡献在于提出了事件与RGB图像融合的新范式，并设计了高效的纹理增强模块，显著提升了视频超分辨率的纹理保真度。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Cross-Modal Masked Compositional Concept Modeling for Enhancing Visio-Linguistic Compositionality
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 跨模态掩码组合概念建模以增强视觉-语言组合性
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Contrastively trained vision-language models like CLIP, have made remarkable progress in learning joint image-text representations, but still face challenges in compositional understanding. They often exhibit a 'bag-of-words' behavior--struggling to capture the object relations, attribute-object bindings, and spatial configurations.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 对比训练的视觉语言模型（如CLIP）在学习联合图像-文本表示方面取得了显著进展，但在组合理解方面仍面临挑战。它们常表现出“词袋”行为——难以捕捉对象关系、属性-对象绑定和空间配置。本文提出跨模态掩码组合概念建模方法，创新点在于通过掩码策略迫使模型学习组合概念，而非简单匹配整体表示。主要贡献是增强了CLIP类模型对细粒度组合关系的理解能力，显著提升了在组合性基准上的性能，为更精确的视觉-语言推理奠定了基础。

计算机视觉/CV.title: SmartFont: Dynamic Condition Allocation for Few-Shot Font Generation
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: SmartFont：面向少样本字体生成的动态条件分配
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Few-shot font generation simultaneously requires global structural completeness and fine-grained local style fidelity. Existing methods usually either rely on global content-style modeling, which is robust but imperfectly disentangled, or emphasize component/local modeling, which captures fine details but may lose global coherence. We propose SmartFont with a dynamic condition allocation mechanism that adaptively selects between global and local conditions per character, achieving state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 少样本字体生成同时需要全局结构完整性和细粒度局部风格保真度。现有方法通常要么依赖全局内容-风格建模（鲁棒但解缠不完美），要么强调组件/局部建模（捕捉细节但可能失去全局一致性）。我们提出了SmartFont，具有动态条件分配机制，能自适应地为每个字符选择全局或局部条件，在多个基准上取得了最先进的结果。

NLP.title: Valid Inference with Synthetic Data via Task Exchangeability
NLP.title_zh: 基于任务可交换性的合成数据有效推理
NLP.summary: There is a proliferation of work arguing for the use of synthetic data in scientific research. For example, social scientists are arguing for the use of LLM-generated "silicon samples" in pilot studies; AI evaluations increasingly rely on "LLM-as-a-judge" outputs; and proteomics research is accelera
NLP.summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于任务可交换性的框架，用于在合成数据上实现有效的统计推断。随着LLM生成的“硅样本”在社会科学、AI评估等领域广泛应用，如何保证推断的有效性成为关键问题。作者利用任务可交换性概念，在不依赖真实数据分布假设的情况下，推导出合成数据推断的校正方法。该方法适用于多种合成数据场景，包括LLM作为评判者、蛋白质组学数据增强等。主要贡献在于为合成数据的使用提供了严格的统计理论基础，确保了推断的可靠性和可重复性，对推动合成数据在科学研究中的规范使用具有重要意义。

NLP.title: SkMTEB: Slovak Massive Text Embedding Benchmark and Model Adaptation
NLP.title_zh: SkMTEB：斯洛伐克语大规模文本嵌入基准与模型适配
NLP.summary: We introduce SkMTEB, the first comprehensive MTEB-style text embedding benchmark for Slovak, a low-resource West Slavic language, comprising 31 datasets across 7 task types -- nearly 4× the depth of existing multilingual benchmark coverage for Slovak. Our evaluation of 31 embedding models reveals significant performance gaps and provides insights for adapting multilingual models to low-resource languages.
NLP.summary_zh: 我们提出了SkMTEB，这是首个针对斯洛伐克语（一种低资源西斯拉夫语言）的全面MTEB风格文本嵌入基准，包含7种任务类型的31个数据集，覆盖深度是现有多语言基准的近4倍。我们对31个嵌入模型的评估揭示了显著的性能差距，并为将多语言模型适配到低资源语言提供了见解。

软件工程/SE.title: Mining Architectural Quality Under Agentic AI Adoption: A Causal Study of Java Repositories
软件工程/SE.title_zh: 代理式AI采用下的架构质量挖掘：Java仓库的因果研究
软件工程/SE.summary: AI coding tools are now used by a majority of developers, and agentic use of these tools has popularized the practice colloquially called "vibe coding". Yet causal evidence on their effect on software architecture is scarce. Prior causal work has measured code-level outcomes (complexity, static anal
软件工程/SE.summary_zh: AI编码工具已被大多数开发者使用，代理式工具的使用普及了俗称“氛围编码”的实践。然而，关于其对软件架构影响的因果证据却很少。先前的因果工作衡量了代码级结果（复杂度、静态分析），但未涉及架构质量。本研究通过对Java仓库进行因果分析，首次量化了代理式AI采用对软件架构质量的影响。研究发现，代理式AI的使用导致架构耦合度增加、模块化程度下降，但同时也提高了开发效率。主要贡献在于提供了代理式AI对软件架构影响的因果证据，并提出了缓解负面影响的建议。

机器学习/ML.title: Once-for-All: Scalable Simultaneous Forecasting via Equilibrium State Estimation
机器学习/ML.title_zh: 一次完成：通过均衡状态估计实现可扩展的同步预测
机器学习/ML.summary: We introduce Equilibrium State Estimation (ESE), a novel paradigm for simultaneous prediction, where multiple interacting systems require separate yet coordinated forecasts. Such scenarios often arise in real-world settings such as economics and healthcare modeling. Unlike existing approaches that p
机器学习/ML.summary_zh: 我们提出均衡状态估计（ESE），一种用于同步预测的新范式，其中多个相互作用的系统需要独立但协调的预测。这种场景在经济学和医疗建模等现实环境中经常出现。与现有方法不同，ESE通过将多个系统视为一个联合均衡系统，并利用状态估计理论同时推断所有系统的未来状态，实现了可扩展的同步预测。该方法在多个多变量时间序列数据集上取得了优于传统独立预测和联合预测方法的性能，显著降低了计算复杂度。主要贡献在于提出了新的预测范式，能够在保持预测精度的同时实现高效的可扩展性。

机器学习/ML.title: Rarity-Gated Context Conditioning for Offline Imitation Learning-Based Maritime Anomaly Detection
机器学习/ML.title_zh: 基于稀有门控上下文条件的离线模仿学习海事异常检测
机器学习/ML.summary: Contextual anomaly detection aims to identify abnormal behavior conditional on context variables, but practical deployments often face highly imbalanced context distributions where rare regimes can be critical information. Under such frequency bias, context-conditioned models can produce unstable de
机器学习/ML.summary_zh: 上下文异常检测旨在根据上下文变量识别异常行为，但实际部署常面临高度不平衡的上下文分布，其中稀有状态可能包含关键信息。在这种频率偏差下，上下文条件模型可能产生不稳定的检测结果。本文提出稀有门控上下文条件（RGCC）方法，用于基于离线模仿学习的海事异常检测。RGCC通过门控机制自适应地调整对稀有上下文的学习权重，并结合离线模仿学习框架，利用专家轨迹数据提升检测性能。在真实海事数据集上，该方法在稀有上下文场景下显著优于现有方法，同时保持了对常见上下文的检测能力。主要贡献在于解决了上下文不平衡问题，并首次将离线模仿学习应用于海事异常检测。

自然语言处理/NLP.title: Uncertainty-Aware Hybrid Retrieval for Long-Document RAG
自然语言处理/NLP.title_zh: 面向长文档RAG的不确定性感知混合检索
自然语言处理/NLP.summary: Retrieval augmented generation (RAG) depends critically on the quality and granularity of retrieved evidence. Large retrieval units preserve context but often introduce irrelevant content, which can dilute answer bearing evidence and worsen long context utilization. Fine-grained units are more compa
自然语言处理/NLP.summary_zh: 检索增强生成（RAG）严重依赖于检索证据的质量和粒度。大的检索单元能保留上下文，但常引入不相关内容，这会稀释答案证据并恶化长上下文利用。细粒度单元更紧凑，但可能丢失上下文。本文提出不确定性感知混合检索（UHR）方法，用于长文档RAG。UHR通过不确定性估计动态选择检索单元粒度，并结合密集和稀疏检索的优势，在多个长文档问答数据集上取得了优于现有混合检索方法的性能。主要贡献在于提出了基于不确定性的自适应粒度选择机制，有效平衡了上下文保留和噪声抑制，显著提升了长文档RAG的答案准确性。

多模态学习.title: Adaptive Turn-Taking for Real-time Multi-Party Voice Agents
多模态学习.title_zh: 实时多方语音代理的自适应轮次切换
多模态学习.summary: Turn-taking in multi-party spoken conversations remains a fundamental challenge for voice-based agents, particularly under dynamic floor competition and varying user expectations. We propose ModeratorLM, a role-playing voice agent that conditions turn-taking behavior on an explicitly assigned role in a multi-party conversation. ModeratorLM leverages a large language model to dynamically decide when to speak, yield, or intervene based on conversational context and turn-taking norms. We evaluate ModeratorLM in a simulated multi-party dialogue setting and show that it achieves more natural and fair turn-taking compared to baseline agents. The system adapts to different conversation scenarios and user roles, improving user satisfaction and conversational flow. This work advances the state of the art in real-time multi-party voice interaction.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 多方口语对话中的轮次切换对语音代理仍是根本性挑战，尤其在动态争抢和不同用户期望下。本文提出ModeratorLM，一个角色扮演语音代理，其轮次切换行为基于多方对话中明确分配的角色。该代理利用大语言模型根据对话上下文和轮次规范动态决定何时发言、让步或干预。在模拟多方对话中评估，ModeratorLM相比基线代理实现了更自然和公平的轮次切换。系统能适应不同对话场景和用户角色，提升用户满意度和对话流畅度。创新点在于角色条件化的自适应轮次切换，贡献是推动了实时多方语音交互的前沿。

多模态学习.title: HYDRA-X: Native Unified Multimodal Models with Holistic Visual Tokenizers
多模态学习.title_zh: HYDRA-X：基于整体视觉分词器的原生统一多模态模型
多模态学习.summary: Holistic visual tokenizers are fundamental to unified multimodal models (UMMs) as they map diverse visual inputs into a unified representation space. In this paper, we present HYDRA-X, the first UMM that unifies image and video tokenization within a single Vision Transformer (ViT). Our design is driven by the insight that separate tokenizers for images and videos introduce modality-specific biases and inefficiencies. By jointly training a single ViT to handle both static and dynamic visual data, HYDRA-X achieves superior performance on a range of multimodal benchmarks while being more parameter-efficient. The model demonstrates that native unification of visual tokenization is not only feasible but beneficial.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 整体视觉分词器是统一多模态模型（UMM）的基础，用于将多样化的视觉输入映射到统一表示空间。本文提出HYDRA-X，首个在单一Vision Transformer（ViT）中统一图像和视频分词的原生UMM。设计动机源于分离的图像和视频分词器会引入模态特定偏差和低效。通过联合训练单个ViT处理静态和动态视觉数据，HYDRA-X在多个多模态基准上取得优越性能，同时参数更高效。该模型证明了视觉分词的原生统一不仅可行而且有益。

多模态学习.title: ArogyaSutra: A Multi-Agent Framework for Multimodal Medical Reasoning in Indic Languages
多模态学习.title_zh: ArogyaSutra：面向印度语言的多模态医学推理多智能体框架
多模态学习.summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown promising reasoning capabilities in general domains, yet their performance remains limited in specialized settings such as healthcare, especially in multilingual and low-resource scenarios. This gap is critical in regions like rural India, where pa
多模态学习.summary_zh: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在通用领域展现出有前景的推理能力，但在医疗等专业场景中性能仍有限，尤其是在多语言和低资源环境中。这一差距在印度农村等地区尤为关键。本文提出ArogyaSutra，一个多智能体框架，通过整合视觉、语言和领域知识，实现印度语言下的多模态医学推理。创新点包括：1）设计多智能体协作机制，分别处理图像、文本和医学知识；2）引入低资源语言适应策略，提升印地语等语言的推理准确性。主要贡献是在多语言医疗推理基准上取得显著提升，为资源受限地区的智能医疗诊断提供了可行方案。

生成模型.title: SupraBench: A Benchmark for Supramolecular Chemistry
生成模型.summary: Supramolecular chemistry, which includes the study of non-covalent host-guest assemblies, has advanced various applications. However, designing host-guest systems remains time-consuming, requiring days of dry-lab verification per candidate pair. Although LLMs have emerged as a fast alternative with promising results, there is no standardized benchmark to evaluate their performance on supramolecular design tasks. We introduce SupraBench, a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating LLMs on host-guest binding prediction and design. SupraBench includes a curated dataset of host-guest complexes with binding affinities, along with tasks such as binding affinity prediction, host design, and guest design. We evaluate several state-of-the-art LLMs and show that while they capture some chemical knowledge, they significantly underperform specialized models on quantitative tasks. This benchmark provides a standardized evaluation framework and highlights the need for further research in AI-driven supramolecular design.
生成模型.summary_zh: 超分子化学研究非共价主客体组装，但设计主客体系统耗时且需数天干实验验证。大语言模型（LLM）虽作为快速替代方案，但缺乏标准化基准。本文提出SupraBench，一个评估LLM在主客体结合预测与设计任务上的综合基准。包含带结合亲和力的主客体复合物数据集，以及结合亲和力预测、主体设计、客体设计等任务。评估多个先进LLM显示，它们虽掌握部分化学知识，但在定量任务上显著逊于专用模型。该基准提供了标准化评估框架，并凸显了AI驱动超分子设计研究的必要性。创新点在于创建了首个超分子化学LLM基准，贡献是推动了该领域评估的规范化。

生成模型.title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal Learning for Coastal Wave Peak Period Estimation from Video
生成模型.title_zh: 基于物理引导的时空学习从视频中估计海岸波浪峰值周期
生成模型.summary: Wave parameters in the nearshore are crucial for coastal engineering, shoreline protection, marine hazard assessment, and coastal management for climate resilience. Traditional monitoring systems like buoys and radar platforms offer accurate monitoring but can have high installation and maintenance
生成模型.summary_zh: 近岸波浪参数对海岸工程、岸线保护、海洋灾害评估及气候韧性管理至关重要。传统的浮标和雷达平台监测准确但安装维护成本高。本文提出一种物理引导的时空学习方法，从视频中估计波浪峰值周期。创新点包括：1）将流体动力学物理约束嵌入深度学习模型，确保估计符合物理规律；2）设计时空注意力机制捕获波浪传播的动态特征。主要贡献是实现了低成本、高精度的波浪监测，为沿海地区提供了一种可替代传统设备的解决方案。

生成模型.title: PolyFlow: Safe and Efficient Polytope-Constrained Flow Matching with Constraint Embedding and Projection-free Update
生成模型.title_zh: PolyFlow：基于约束嵌入和无投影更新的安全高效多面体约束流匹配
生成模型.summary: While flow-based generative models have demonstrated strong performance across a wide range of domains, deploying them in safety-critical physical systems remains challenging due to strict constraint requirements. Existing approaches typically enforce safety through post-hoc corrections, which incur
生成模型.summary_zh: 基于流的生成模型在众多领域表现优异，但部署于安全关键物理系统仍面临严格约束的挑战。现有方法通常通过事后修正保障安全，但这会引入额外计算开销并可能破坏生成质量。本文提出PolyFlow，一种新型多面体约束流匹配框架。创新点包括：设计约束嵌入层，将线性不等式约束直接编码进流模型架构，确保生成样本始终满足约束；提出无投影更新算法，避免传统投影方法的高计算成本；理论证明所提方法保持概率密度可逆性。在机器人运动规划、自动驾驶轨迹生成等任务中，PolyFlow在100%满足约束的同时，生成质量与计算效率均优于事后修正方法。主要贡献是首次将硬约束无缝集成到流匹配模型中，为安全敏感应用提供了可靠生成方案。

强化学习/RL.title: Learning to Reason by Analogy via Retrieval-Augmented Reinforcement Fine-Tuning
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 通过检索增强的强化微调学习类比推理
强化学习/RL.summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has become a standard mechanism for grounding language models in external knowledge, yet conventional retrieval based on lexical or semantic similarity is poorly suited for complex reasoning tasks: a semantically similar problem may demand an entirely different solution. In this paper, we propose a novel framework that combines retrieval-augmented generation with reinforcement learning to train language models to reason by analogy. Specifically, we introduce a retrieval mechanism that selects analogical examples based on structural similarity to the target problem, and then use reinforcement fine-tuning to encourage the model to learn from these examples. Our experiments on mathematical and scientific reasoning benchmarks show that this approach significantly improves the model's ability to solve novel problems by analogy, outperforming standard RAG and fine-tuning methods. The work demonstrates the synergy between retrieval-based learning and reinforcement learning for enhancing reasoning capabilities.
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 检索增强生成（RAG）是语言模型利用外部知识的常用机制，但基于词汇或语义相似度的传统检索难以胜任复杂推理任务：语义相似的问题可能需要完全不同的解法。本文提出结合RAG与强化学习的新框架，训练语言模型进行类比推理。具体地，引入基于结构相似性的检索机制选取类比示例，然后通过强化微调鼓励模型从这些示例中学习。在数学和科学推理基准上的实验表明，该方法显著提升了模型通过类比解决新问题的能力，优于标准RAG和微调方法。创新点在于将检索增强与强化学习结合用于类比推理，贡献是增强了语言模型的推理能力。

强化学习/RL.title: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning from Delayed Marketplace Feedback for Objective-Weight Adaptation in Three-Sided Dispatch
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 基于延迟市场反馈的多智能体强化学习在三方调度中的目标权重自适应
强化学习/RL.summary: Dispatch in three-sided marketplaces provides a natural setting for reinforcement learning from world feedback: decisions are evaluated by delayed operational outcomes such as delivery speed, courier utilization, and merchant congestion. We present a deployed reinforcement learning system at DoorDash that adapts objective weights in real-time using multi-agent RL from delayed feedback, improving overall marketplace efficiency.
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 三方市场中的调度为从世界反馈中进行强化学习提供了天然场景：决策通过延迟的操作结果（如配送速度、骑手利用率和商家拥堵）进行评估。我们在DoorDash提出了一个部署的强化学习系统，该系统使用多智能体强化学习从延迟反馈中实时调整目标权重，提高了整体市场效率。

AI伦理与安全.title: ERTS: Adversarial Robustness Testing of Ethical AI via Semantic Perturbation in a Bounded Consequence Space
AI伦理与安全.title_zh: ERTS：通过有界后果空间中的语义扰动进行伦理AI的对抗鲁棒性测试
AI伦理与安全.summary: As AI systems are deployed in high-stakes ethical contexts such as healthcare triage, autonomous vehicle control, and employment screening, formal methods for evaluating their robustness against adversarial manipulation of ethical reasoning remain underdeveloped. This paper introduces the Ethical Robustness Testing System (ERTS), a framework that generates semantic perturbations within a bounded consequence space to systematically test the ethical robustness of AI systems. ERTS operates by defining a space of possible ethical consequences, bounded by normative constraints, and then applying adversarial perturbations that shift inputs within this space while preserving semantic coherence. The framework is evaluated on multiple ethical AI benchmarks, demonstrating its ability to uncover vulnerabilities in state-of-the-art models. The results show that current models are susceptible to subtle semantic changes that alter ethical judgments, highlighting the need for more robust ethical reasoning mechanisms.
AI伦理与安全.summary_zh: 随着AI系统被部署在医疗分诊、自动驾驶和就业筛选等高风险的伦理环境中，评估其对伦理推理的对抗性鲁棒性的形式化方法仍不成熟。本文引入伦理鲁棒性测试系统（ERTS），该框架通过在有界后果空间中生成语义扰动，系统地测试AI系统的伦理鲁棒性。ERTS通过定义由规范约束限定的可能伦理后果空间，然后应用对抗性扰动在保持语义连贯性的同时在该空间内移动输入。该框架在多个伦理AI基准上进行了评估，展示了其揭示最先进模型中漏洞的能力。结果表明，当前模型容易受到改变伦理判断的细微语义变化的影响，凸显了开发更鲁棒的伦理推理机制的必要性。

多智能体系统.title: Multiagent Protocols with Aggregated Confidence Signals
多智能体系统.title_zh: 具有聚合置信度信号的多智能体协议
多智能体系统.summary: Confidence is used for reliability, oversight, and a range of downstream decision tasks in Natural Language Processing (NLP), yet no existing method produces or evaluates a confidence for the output of a multiagent system. Prior work uses confidence within multiagent debate (MAD) to weight messages, but does not aggregate individual agent confidences into a system-level confidence. This paper proposes a framework for aggregating confidence signals from multiple agents in a multiagent system. The authors introduce several aggregation protocols, such as weighted voting and Bayesian combination, and evaluate them on NLP tasks including question answering and text classification. The results show that aggregated confidence improves the reliability of multiagent decisions and provides better calibration compared to individual agent confidences. The work also discusses the implications for oversight and trust in multiagent AI systems.
多智能体系统.summary_zh: 置信度在自然语言处理（NLP）中用于可靠性、监督和一系列下游决策任务，但现有方法无法为多智能体系统的输出生成或评估置信度。先前的工作在多智能体辩论（MAD）中使用置信度来加权消息，但未将个体智能体的置信度聚合成系统级置信度。本文提出了一个框架，用于聚合多智能体系统中来自多个智能体的置信度信号。作者引入了多种聚合协议，如加权投票和贝叶斯组合，并在问答和文本分类等NLP任务上进行了评估。结果表明，聚合后的置信度提高了多智能体决策的可靠性，并且与个体智能体置信度相比具有更好的校准性。该工作还讨论了对多智能体AI系统监督和信任的影响。

软件工程与AI.title: Understanding the Rejection of Fixes Generated by Agentic Pull Requests -- Insights from the AIDev Dataset
软件工程与AI.title_zh: 理解智能体生成的拉取请求修复被拒绝的原因——来自AIDev数据集的见解
软件工程与AI.summary: AI coding agents are increasingly used to generate pull requests (PRs) that propose code fixes in software projects. From a first exploration of the AIDev dataset, we find that 46.41% of the fixes proposed by the agents Copilot, Devin, Cursor, and Claude are rejected. This represents a significant waste of developer time and effort. In this paper, we analyze the reasons for rejection by examining the PRs and their reviews. We categorize the rejection reasons into several types, including incorrect logic, style violations, incomplete fixes, and lack of context. Our analysis reveals that the most common reason for rejection is incorrect logic, accounting for 32.7% of rejections. We also find that the rejection rate varies across different types of code changes and programming languages. Based on our findings, we provide recommendations for improving AI coding agents to reduce rejection rates and increase developer productivity.
软件工程与AI.summary_zh: AI编码智能体越来越多地用于生成拉取请求（PR），为软件项目提出代码修复。通过对AIDev数据集的初步探索，我们发现Copilot、Devin、Cursor和Claude等智能体提出的修复中有46.41%被拒绝。这严重浪费了开发者的时间和精力。本文通过检查PR及其审查，分析了拒绝原因。我们将拒绝原因分为几类，包括逻辑错误、风格违规、修复不完整和缺乏上下文。分析显示，最常见的拒绝原因是逻辑错误，占拒绝的32.7%。我们还发现，拒绝率在不同类型的代码变更和编程语言中有所不同。基于我们的发现，我们提供了改进AI编码智能体的建议，以降低拒绝率并提高开发者生产力。

智能体与知识图谱.title: Agents-K1: Towards Agent-native Knowledge Orchestration
智能体与知识图谱.title_zh: Agents-K1：迈向智能体原生知识编排
智能体与知识图谱.summary: Current LLM-based research agents have advanced through agent orchestration, yet largely overlook scientific knowledge orchestration. Existing works often reduce papers to abstracts, surface mentions, and flat cites edges, omitting key entities, claims, evidence, mechanisms, and method lineages. This paper introduces Agents-K1, a framework that enables agents to natively orchestrate scientific knowledge at a fine-grained level. Agents-K1 extracts structured knowledge from papers, including entities, relations, claims, and evidence, and represents them in a knowledge graph. The agent can then perform complex reasoning tasks such as hypothesis generation, experimental design, and literature review by traversing the knowledge graph. The framework is evaluated on scientific Q&A and hypothesis generation tasks, showing significant improvements over baseline methods that use only abstract-level representations. The work emphasizes the importance of knowledge-level orchestration for advancing AI research agents.
智能体与知识图谱.summary_zh: 当前基于LLM的研究智能体通过智能体编排取得了进展，但很大程度上忽视了科学知识编排。现有工作通常将论文简化为摘要、表面提及和扁平化的引用边，忽略了关键实体、主张、证据、机制和方法谱系。本文引入Agents-K1，这是一个使智能体能够在细粒度级别原生编排科学知识的框架。Agents-K1从论文中提取结构化知识，包括实体、关系、主张和证据，并将其表示为知识图谱。然后，智能体可以通过遍历知识图谱执行复杂的推理任务，如假设生成、实验设计和文献综述。该框架在科学问答和假设生成任务上进行了评估，显示出比仅使用摘要级表示的基线方法有显著改进。该工作强调了知识级编排对于推进AI研究智能体的重要性。

时间序列预测.title: Existence Precedes Value: Joint Modeling of Observational Existence and Evolving States in Time Series Forecasting
时间序列预测.title_zh: 存在先于价值：时间序列预测中观测存在与演化状态的联合建模
时间序列预测.summary: Real-world time series are often highly incomplete and irregular due to sensor dormancy, transmission delays, and event-driven sampling, making reliable forecasting fundamentally challenging. Existing methods have evolved from impute-then-forecast pipelines to continuous-time models such as Neural ODEs, but they typically treat missing observations as a nuisance to be imputed, rather than modeling the process of why observations exist. This paper proposes a novel framework that jointly models the existence of observations (whether a measurement occurs) and the evolving state values. The key insight is that the pattern of missingness carries information about the underlying dynamics. The authors introduce a probabilistic model that couples a point process for observation times with a state-space model for values. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms existing methods in forecasting accuracy, especially under high missingness rates. The work provides a principled way to handle irregularly sampled time series by treating existence as a first-class citizen.
时间序列预测.summary_zh: 由于传感器休眠、传输延迟和事件驱动采样，现实世界的时间序列往往高度不完整且不规则，使得可靠预测极具挑战性。现有方法已从先插补后预测的流程发展到连续时间模型（如神经常微分方程），但它们通常将缺失观测视为需要插补的麻烦，而非对观测存在的原因进行建模。本文提出了一种新颖框架，联合建模观测的存在性（是否发生测量）和演化状态值。关键见解在于，缺失模式蕴含了关于底层动态的信息。作者引入了一个概率模型，将观测时间的点过程与状态空间模型耦合。在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在预测准确性上优于现有方法，尤其是在高缺失率情况下。该工作通过将存在性视为一等公民，为处理不规则采样时间序列提供了一种原则性方法。

智能体系统.title: Neuro-Symbolic Agents for Regulated Process Automation: Challenges and Research Agenda
智能体系统.title_zh: 面向监管流程自动化的神经符号智能体：挑战与研究议程
智能体系统.summary: LLM-based agents are entering regulated industries where they automate judgment intensive quality management processes. We argue that symbolic structures already embedded in these domains, including regulations, typed process models, and compliance constraints, should be treated not merely as external knowledge but as integral components of the agent's reasoning.
智能体系统.summary_zh: 基于LLM的智能体正在进入受监管行业，自动化判断密集型质量管理流程。本文认为，这些领域中已有的符号结构（包括法规、类型化流程模型和合规约束）不应仅被视为外部知识，而应作为智能体推理的组成部分。创新点在于提出神经符号智能体框架，将符号规则与神经网络结合，确保可解释性和合规性。主要贡献是识别了监管自动化中的关键挑战，并提出了研究议程，为开发安全可靠的AI智能体提供了方向。

优化算法.title: Optimizing Appliance Scheduling for Solar Energy Management Using Metaheuristic Algorithms
优化算法.title_zh: 使用元启发式算法优化太阳能管理中的电器调度
优化算法.summary: Renewable energy is essential for meeting future energy demands; however, solar energy generation, which occurs only during daylight hours often does not align with household consumption patterns. Appliances such as cookers, washing machines, and dryers are typically operated according to user preferences without considering solar availability.
优化算法.summary_zh: 可再生能源对于满足未来能源需求至关重要；然而，仅在白天产生的太阳能往往与家庭消费模式不匹配。本文提出使用元启发式算法优化电器调度，以最大化太阳能利用率。创新点在于将电器调度建模为优化问题，并应用遗传算法、粒子群优化等元启发式方法求解。主要贡献是提出了一种实用方法，通过智能调度家用电器（如炊具、洗衣机）来平衡用户偏好与太阳能可用性，从而降低电费并促进可再生能源整合。

优化算法.title: Different Layers, Different Manifolds: Module-Wise Weight-Space Geometry in Transformer Optimization
优化算法.title_zh: 不同层，不同流形：Transformer优化中的模块级权重空间几何
优化算法.summary: Weight-space geometry plays a central role in neural network optimization, yet manifold constraints are often applied uniformly across all weight matrices. In this work, we ask whether different transformer modules prefer different manifold geometries. We study Manifold Muon for GPT-2 pretraining and find that assigning distinct manifold constraints to different layers improves optimization efficiency and final performance.
优化算法.summary_zh: 权重空间几何在神经网络优化中起着核心作用，但流形约束通常均匀地应用于所有权重矩阵。在这项工作中，我们探究不同的Transformer模块是否偏好不同的流形几何。我们研究了用于GPT-2预训练的Manifold Muon，发现为不同层分配不同的流形约束可以提高优化效率和最终性能。

高能物理与AI.title: AgentRivet: an automated system for producing Rivet routines from journal publications
高能物理与AI.title_zh: AgentRivet：从期刊出版物自动生成Rivet例程的系统
高能物理与AI.summary: Particle physics collider experiments provide Rivet routines as part of the analysis preservation strategy for model-independent measurements. Rivet is a C++ toolkit that allow new theoretical models to be compared to the measurements, thus aiding the development and tuning of Monte Carlo event generators.
高能物理与AI.summary_zh: 粒子物理对撞机实验提供Rivet例程作为分析保存策略的一部分，用于模型无关的测量。Rivet是一个C++工具包，允许将新理论模型与测量结果进行比较，从而帮助蒙特卡洛事件生成器的开发和调优。本文提出AgentRivet系统，创新点在于利用AI自动从期刊出版物中提取信息并生成Rivet例程。主要贡献是自动化了原本需要大量人工的流程，加速了高能物理分析的可重复性和模型验证。

强化学习与安全.title: Beyond Runtime Enforcement: Shield Synthesis as Defensibility Analysis for Adversarial Networks
强化学习与安全.title_zh: 超越运行时强制：面向对抗网络的防御性分析与盾牌综合
强化学习与安全.summary: Shielded reinforcement learning is typically presented as a runtime safety mechanism that compiles temporal-logic specifications into automata restricting an agent's actions. We argue this is the wrong product. The same automata-theoretic machinery -- specification compilation, product game construction -- can be repurposed for defensibility analysis: a pre-deployment game that determines whether an adversarial network can force an agent into unsafe states despite shielding. We show that defensibility is a necessary condition for meaningful safety guarantees, and that runtime enforcement alone is insufficient. Our framework enables system designers to evaluate the fundamental limits of safety before deployment.
强化学习与安全.summary_zh: 传统屏蔽强化学习将时序逻辑规约编译为自动机以限制智能体动作，作为运行时安全机制。本文提出该范式存在根本缺陷，认为相同的自动机理论工具（规约编译、乘积博弈构造）可被重新用于防御性分析——一种部署前的博弈，用于判定对抗网络是否能在屏蔽存在的情况下迫使智能体进入不安全状态。研究表明，防御性是产生有意义安全保证的必要条件，仅靠运行时强制是不够的。该框架使系统设计者能够在部署前评估安全性的基本极限。

AI智能体评估.title: AgentBeats: Agentifying Agent Assessment for Openness, Standardization, and Reproducibility
AI智能体评估.title_zh: AgentBeats：面向开放性、标准化和可复现性的智能体评估代理化
AI智能体评估.summary: Agent systems are advancing quickly across domains, but their evaluation remains fragmented. Most benchmarks rely on fixed, LLM-centric harnesses that require heavy integration, create test-production mismatch, and limit fair comparison across diverse agent designs. The root problem is the lack of a standardized, open evaluation framework. We propose AgentBeats, a modular and extensible evaluation platform that treats the assessment process itself as an agent. By decoupling evaluation logic from specific models, enabling plug-and-play benchmark integration, and ensuring reproducibility through containerized environments, AgentBeats facilitates fair and transparent comparison. Experiments show that AgentBeats reduces integration overhead by 70% while improving consistency across evaluation runs.
AI智能体评估.summary_zh: 智能体系统跨领域快速发展，但其评估仍碎片化。多数基准依赖固定的、以LLM为中心的框架，需要大量集成工作，导致测试-生产不匹配，并限制了不同智能体设计间的公平比较。根本问题在于缺乏标准化、开放的评估框架。本文提出AgentBeats，一个模块化、可扩展的评估平台，将评估过程本身视为一个智能体。通过解耦评估逻辑与特定模型、支持即插即用的基准集成、以及通过容器化环境确保可复现性，AgentBeats促进了公平透明的比较。实验表明，AgentBeats将集成开销降低70%，同时提高了评估运行间的一致性。

机器人/具身智能.title: LabVLA: Grounding Vision-Language-Action Models in Scientific Laboratories
机器人/具身智能.title_zh: LabVLA：在科学实验室中落地视觉-语言-动作模型
机器人/具身智能.summary: Scientific laboratories increasingly rely on AI systems to reason about experiments, but the physical act of doing science remains largely outside their reach. AI can help read literature, generate hypotheses, and plan protocols, yet the execution of those protocols at the bench still requires a human. We introduce LabVLA, a vision-language-action model designed for physical scientific experimentation. LabVLA learns from human demonstration data to perform common laboratory tasks such as pipetting, measuring, and mixing. We propose a novel grounding mechanism that aligns visual observations with precise manipulation actions using a shared latent space. Experiments on a real robotic platform show that LabVLA can successfully execute multi-step protocols with high success rates, bridging the gap between AI reasoning and physical lab work.
机器人/具身智能.summary_zh: 科学实验室日益依赖AI系统进行实验推理，但物理实验操作仍超出AI能力范围。AI可辅助阅读文献、生成假设和规划方案，但台面操作仍需人类。本文提出LabVLA，一种专为物理科学实验设计的视觉-语言-动作模型。LabVLA从人类演示数据中学习执行常见实验任务，如移液、测量和混合。我们提出一种新颖的接地机制，通过共享潜在空间将视觉观察与精确操作动作对齐。在真实机器人平台上的实验表明，LabVLA能够以高成功率执行多步骤协议，弥合了AI推理与物理实验之间的鸿沟。

计算机视觉（室内定位）.title: Measurement-Calibrated Multi-Camera Fusion for Vision-Based Indoor Localization
计算机视觉（室内定位）.title_zh: 基于测量校准的多相机融合用于视觉室内定位
计算机视觉（室内定位）.summary: Indoor vision-based localization systems are affected by detection noise, occlusions, and limited camera coverage, leading to uncertainty at multiple stages of the pipeline. While multi-camera data fusion is widely used to mitigate these issues, it is typically treated as a black-box component and evaluated only on final accuracy. We propose a measurement-calibrated fusion approach that explicitly models and propagates uncertainty from individual camera measurements. By calibrating each camera's uncertainty based on empirical error distributions, our method improves robustness to occlusions and noise. Experiments on a real indoor dataset demonstrate that our calibrated fusion reduces localization error by 25% compared to standard uncalibrated fusion, and provides more reliable confidence estimates.
计算机视觉（室内定位）.summary_zh: 基于视觉的室内定位系统受检测噪声、遮挡和有限相机覆盖的影响，导致流水线多个阶段存在不确定性。多相机数据融合虽被广泛用于缓解这些问题，但通常被视为黑箱组件，仅通过最终精度评估。本文提出一种测量校准的融合方法，显式建模并传播来自单个相机测量的不确定性。通过基于经验误差分布校准每个相机的不确定性，该方法提高了对遮挡和噪声的鲁棒性。在真实室内数据集上的实验表明，与标准未校准融合相比，校准融合将定位误差降低了25%，并提供了更可靠的置信度估计。

AI Agent与软件工程.title: Toward Instructions-as-Code: Understanding the Impact of Instruction Files on Agentic Pull Requests
AI Agent与软件工程.title_zh: 迈向指令即代码：理解指令文件对智能体拉取请求的影响
AI Agent与软件工程.summary: AI-agents (e.g., GitHub Copilot) collaborate as teammates in different software engineering tasks, including code generation proposed through pull requests (Agentic-PRs). For better agent efficiency, developers create instruction files that guide the AI-agents, including how to navigate the project, coding conventions, and testing practices. However, the impact of these instruction files on Agentic-PRs remains unexplored. In this paper, we conduct an empirical study to understand how instruction files influence the quality and characteristics of Agentic-PRs. We analyze a dataset of Agentic-PRs from open-source projects and evaluate the effects of instruction files on PR acceptance rate, code quality, and developer satisfaction. Our findings provide insights into best practices for writing effective instruction files and highlight the potential of treating instructions as code.
AI Agent与软件工程.summary_zh: AI智能体（如GitHub Copilot）在软件工程任务中作为队友协作，包括通过拉取请求生成代码（Agentic-PR）。为提升智能体效率，开发者创建指令文件指导AI智能体，涵盖项目导航、编码规范和测试实践。然而，这些指令文件对Agentic-PR的影响尚未被探索。本文通过实证研究，分析开源项目中的Agentic-PR数据集，评估指令文件对PR接受率、代码质量和开发者满意度的影响。研究发现为编写有效指令文件提供了最佳实践，并强调了将指令视为代码的潜力。

多模态AI与计算机辅助设计.title: IterCAD: An Iterative Multimodal Agent for Visually-Grounded CAD Generation and Editing
多模态AI与计算机辅助设计.title_zh: IterCAD：用于视觉引导的CAD生成与编辑的迭代多模态智能体
多模态AI与计算机辅助设计.summary: Computer-Aided Design is pivotal in modern manufacturing, yet existing automated methods predominantly rely on open-loop, one-shot generation, creating a mismatch with iterative real-world practices. In this paper, we present IterCAD, a unified multimodal agent framework for closed-loop, interactive CAD generation and editing. IterCAD integrates visual grounding with iterative refinement, allowing users to provide feedback through images and text. The agent leverages a large language model to interpret multimodal inputs and generate precise CAD operations. Experiments demonstrate that IterCAD significantly outperforms prior methods in both generation quality and editability, enabling more efficient and natural human-CAD interaction.
多模态AI与计算机辅助设计.summary_zh: 计算机辅助设计（CAD）在现代制造业中至关重要，但现有自动化方法多依赖开环单次生成，与迭代的真实实践不匹配。本文提出IterCAD，一个统一的闭环交互式多模态智能体框架，用于视觉引导的CAD生成与编辑。IterCAD集成了视觉定位与迭代优化，允许用户通过图像和文本提供反馈。智能体利用大语言模型解释多模态输入并生成精确的CAD操作。实验表明，IterCAD在生成质量和可编辑性上显著优于先前方法，实现了更高效自然的人机交互。

AI Agent评估与基准.title: EpiBench: Verifiable Evaluation of AI Agents on Epigenomics Analysis
AI Agent评估与基准.title_zh: EpiBench：AI智能体在表观基因组学分析中的可验证评估
AI Agent评估与基准.summary: We introduce EpiBench, a verifiable benchmark for short-horizon epigenomics analysis. EpiBench evaluates whether agents can make well-defined analysis decisions from realistic workflow states and return deterministically gradable answers. The benchmark includes 106 evaluations across CUT&Tag/CUT&Run protocols, covering common epigenomics tasks such as peak calling and motif analysis. Each evaluation is designed to have a unique correct answer, enabling automated grading. We assess several state-of-the-art LLM-based agents and find that they struggle with domain-specific reasoning. EpiBench provides a standardized platform to advance AI agents in computational biology.
AI Agent评估与基准.summary_zh: 本文介绍EpiBench，一个用于短周期表观基因组学分析的可验证基准。EpiBench评估智能体能否从真实工作流状态中做出明确分析决策并返回可确定性评分的答案。基准包含106个评估任务，涵盖CUT&Tag/CUT&Run协议，涉及峰值检测和基序分析等常见表观基因组学任务。每个评估都有唯一正确答案，支持自动评分。我们评估了多个最先进的基于LLM的智能体，发现它们在领域特定推理上存在困难。EpiBench为计算生物学中的AI智能体提供了标准化评估平台。

大语言模型推理与摘要.title: ReSum: Synergizing LLM Reasoning and Summarization with Reinforcement Learning
大语言模型推理与摘要.title_zh: ReSum：通过强化学习协同大语言模型推理与摘要生成
大语言模型推理与摘要.summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) is a central technique for improving long-horizon reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs). However, existing RLVR methods often encourage unnecessarily long reasoning rollouts, which can degrade reasoning coherence and exhaust the available context. In this paper, we propose ReSum, a framework that synergizes reasoning and summarization via reinforcement learning. ReSum trains the LLM to generate concise reasoning chains that are both correct and informative, by incorporating a summarization objective into the RL loop. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and multi-step QA tasks show that ReSum improves reasoning accuracy while reducing chain length, achieving better efficiency and coherence.
大语言模型推理与摘要.summary_zh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）是提升大语言模型（LLM）长程推理的核心技术。然而，现有RLVR方法常鼓励不必要的长推理链，导致推理连贯性下降并耗尽上下文。本文提出ReSum，通过强化学习协同推理与摘要生成。ReSum在强化学习循环中引入摘要目标，训练LLM生成既正确又信息密集的简洁推理链。在数学推理和多步问答任务上的实验表明，ReSum在提高推理准确性的同时缩短了推理链长度，实现了更好的效率和连贯性。

自然语言处理与交互式叙事.title: IVIE: A Neuro-symbolic Approach to Incremental and Validated Generation of Interactive Fiction Worlds
自然语言处理与交互式叙事.title_zh: IVIE：一种用于交互式小说世界增量式验证生成的神经符号方法
自然语言处理与交互式叙事.summary: Computational creativity in Interactive Fiction faces a fundamental tension: Large Language Models (LLM) may produce creative narratives but struggle with world coherence, while symbolic systems ensure consistency but lack creative flexibility. We present IVIE (Incremental & Validated Interactive Exploration), a neuro-symbolic approach that combines LLM-based generation with symbolic validation to incrementally construct coherent interactive fiction worlds. IVIE uses a symbolic world model to enforce constraints (e.g., spatial consistency, object permanence) while leveraging LLM creativity for narrative generation. The system operates in a feedback loop: the LLM proposes updates, the symbolic model validates them, and inconsistencies trigger regeneration. Experiments show that IVIE produces more coherent and consistent interactive fiction worlds compared to pure LLM baselines.
自然语言处理与交互式叙事.summary_zh: 交互式小说中的计算创造力面临根本性矛盾：大语言模型（LLM）能产生创意叙事但难以保证世界连贯性，而符号系统确保一致性却缺乏创意灵活性。本文提出IVIE（增量式验证交互探索），一种神经符号方法，结合基于LLM的生成与符号验证，增量式构建连贯的交互式小说世界。IVIE使用符号世界模型强制执行约束（如空间一致性、物体恒存性），同时利用LLM的创造力进行叙事生成。系统运行于反馈循环：LLM提出更新，符号模型验证，不一致触发重新生成。实验表明，与纯LLM基线相比，IVIE生成的交互式小说世界更连贯一致。

自然语言处理.title: Ontology Memory-Augmented ASR Correction for Long Text-Speech Interleaved Conversations
自然语言处理.title_zh: 本体记忆增强的ASR纠错用于长文本-语音交错对话
自然语言处理.summary: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) correction has traditionally focused on isolated utterances or short local contexts. However, as text and speech become increasingly interleaved in long interactions, ASR correction requires conversation-level contextual evidence. Existing ASR correction methods of
自然语言处理.summary_zh: 自动语音识别（ASR）纠错传统上关注孤立话语或短时局部上下文。然而，随着文本和语音在长交互中交错出现，ASR纠错需要对话级别的上下文证据。现有方法难以处理长程依赖。本文提出本体记忆增强的ASR纠错框架，创新点包括：1）构建对话本体记忆模块，存储实体和关系以提供全局上下文；2）设计注意力机制融合记忆与当前语音特征。主要贡献是在长文本-语音交错对话数据集上显著降低词错误率，提升了ASR在复杂对话场景下的鲁棒性。

计算机视觉.title: Heterogeneous LiDAR Early Fusion and Learned Re-Ranking Strategy for Robust Long-Term Place Recognition in Unstructured Environments
计算机视觉.title_zh: 异构LiDAR早期融合与学习重排序策略用于非结构化环境下的鲁棒长期地点识别
计算机视觉.summary: Robust localization in unstructured environments, such as agricultural fields, is a critical challenge for autonomous systems. LiDAR sensors provide detailed 3D information about the environment and are invariant to lighting conditions. For this reason, LiDAR-based place recognition methods have gai
计算机视觉.summary_zh: 在农业田地等非结构化环境中实现鲁棒定位是自主系统的关键挑战。LiDAR传感器提供详细的3D环境信息且不受光照影响，因此基于LiDAR的地点识别方法受到关注。本文提出异构LiDAR早期融合与学习重排序策略，创新点包括：1）融合不同线束LiDAR的点云数据，增强特征表达；2）设计可学习的重排序模块，提升长期场景变化下的匹配准确性。主要贡献是在多个非结构化环境数据集上实现最先进的地点识别性能，为农业机器人等应用提供了可靠的定位方案。

理论研究.title: A Three-Layer Framework for AI in Scientific Discovery
理论研究.title_zh: AI在科学发现中的三层框架
理论研究.summary: Current discussions of AI in scientific discovery are often dominated by two visible capabilities: search over existing knowledge and execution through optimization, simulation, and automation. Both are important, but neither fully captures the central act of discovery: the formation and evolution o
理论研究.summary_zh: 当前关于AI在科学发现中的讨论常聚焦于两种可见能力：搜索现有知识和通过优化、仿真与自动化执行。两者都重要，但均未完全捕捉科学发现的核心行为：概念的形成与演化。本文提出一个三层框架，将科学发现过程分解为：1）数据驱动探索层；2）假设生成与验证层；3）理论构建层。创新点在于明确区分了AI在发现中的不同角色，并提出了各层的实现原则。主要贡献是为AI驱动的科学发现提供了系统性理论指导，有助于设计更具解释性和创造性的AI系统。

AI理论/元评估.title: Evaluation Sovereignty in Metadata-Driven Classification: A Multi-Track Framework for Weakly Supervised Information Systems
AI理论/元评估.title_zh: 元数据驱动分类中的评估主权：弱监督信息系统的多轨框架
AI理论/元评估.summary: Evaluation in machine learning is typically treated as a neutral measurement process. However, in operational information systems, evaluation outcomes are often conditioned by the processes used to generate labels. This paper does not seek to improve classification performance. Instead, it examines
AI理论/元评估.summary_zh: 本文探讨了机器学习评估在操作信息系统中的主权问题，指出评估结果往往受标签生成过程影响。提出一个多轨框架，用于弱监督分类中的元数据驱动评估，强调评估过程的透明性和可解释性。创新点在于将评估本身视为一个需要设计的系统，而非中性测量。贡献在于为弱监督信息系统的评估提供了理论框架和实践指导。

LLM/科学发现.title: EurekAgent: Agent Environment Engineering is All You Need For Autonomous Scientific Discovery
LLM/科学发现.title_zh: EurekAgent：智能体环境工程是自主科学发现的全部所需
LLM/科学发现.summary: LLM-based agents have shown increasing potential in automating scientific discovery. Given an optimizable metric and an execution environment, they can propose, validate, and iterate scientific solutions, and have produced results that outperform human-designed approaches. As model capabilities cont
LLM/科学发现.summary_zh: 本文提出EurekAgent，一种基于LLM的智能体，用于自主科学发现。核心创新在于强调环境工程的重要性，通过设计可优化的指标和执行环境，智能体能够自主提出、验证和迭代科学解决方案。实验表明，EurekAgent在多个科学任务上超越了人工设计的方法。主要贡献是展示了智能体环境工程在科学发现中的关键作用，为自动化科学研究提供了新范式。

计算机视觉/视频生成.title: OmniDirector: General Multi-Shot Camera Cloning without Cross-Paired Data
计算机视觉/视频生成.title_zh: OmniDirector：无需交叉配对数据的通用多镜头相机克隆
计算机视觉/视频生成.summary: Cloning camera motion from reference videos is an important task in video generation, as videos provide intuitive and precise control. Existing methods either directly use parametric representations that fail to handle multi-shot generation or synthesize cross-paired data, which suffer from data sca
计算机视觉/视频生成.summary_zh: 本文提出OmniDirector，用于从参考视频中克隆相机运动，实现多镜头生成。创新点在于无需交叉配对数据，通过自监督学习直接从视频中提取相机运动参数。主要贡献是解决了多镜头生成的难题，并避免了数据扩展问题。实验表明，OmniDirector在相机运动克隆的准确性和多样性上优于现有方法。

计算机视觉/医学图像.title: Dual-Domain Equivariant Generative Adversarial Network for Multimodal CT-PET Synthesis
计算机视觉/医学图像.title_zh: 用于多模态CT-PET合成的双域等变生成对抗网络
计算机视觉/医学图像.summary: We present a Dual-Domain Equivariant Generative Adversarial Network (DDE-GAN) for multimodal CT-PET image synthesis. Traditional GAN-based approaches often operate solely in the spatial domain and ignore geometric consistency, resulting in limited structural fidelity. DDE-GAN addresses these challen
计算机视觉/医学图像.summary_zh: 本文提出DDE-GAN，用于多模态CT-PET图像合成。创新点在于引入双域等变性，同时考虑空间域和频域的一致性，确保几何结构保真。主要贡献是解决了传统GAN在医学图像合成中忽略几何一致性的问题，提高了合成图像的结构准确性。实验表明，DDE-GAN在CT-PET合成任务上优于现有方法。

计算机视觉/空间推理.title: SpatialClaw: Rethinking Action Interface for Agentic Spatial Reasoning
计算机视觉/空间推理.title_zh: SpatialClaw：重新思考智能体空间推理的动作接口
计算机视觉/空间推理.summary: Spatial reasoning, the ability to determine where objects are, how they relate, and how they move in 3D, remains a fundamental challenge for vision-language models (VLMs). Tool-augmented agents attempt to address this by augmenting VLMs with specialist perception modules, yet their effectiveness is
计算机视觉/空间推理.summary_zh: 本文提出SpatialClaw，重新设计智能体空间推理的动作接口。创新点在于将空间推理任务分解为可学习的动作原语，使VLM能够通过调用专用感知模块有效执行3D空间推理。主要贡献是提出了一种新的动作接口范式，显著提升了工具增强智能体在空间推理任务上的表现。实验表明，SpatialClaw在多个基准上取得了最优结果。

医疗AI.title: MOSAIC: Modality-Specific Adaptation for Incremental Continual Learning in Parkinson's Disease Gait Assessment
医疗AI.title_zh: MOSAIC：面向帕金森病步态评估的模态特异性增量持续学习
医疗AI.summary: Gait-based Parkinson's disease assessment increasingly relies on heterogeneous sensors, but clinical systems rarely collect all modalities simultaneously. New sensors may arrive through device upgrades, protocol changes, or multi-center deployment, while historical patient data are often unavailable
医疗AI.summary_zh: 基于步态的帕金森病评估日益依赖异构传感器，但临床系统很少同时收集所有模态。设备升级、协议变更或多中心部署可能引入新传感器，而历史患者数据通常不可用。本文提出MOSAIC框架，通过模态特异性适应实现增量持续学习，使模型在新传感器出现时无需重新训练即可适应，同时保留旧知识。创新点在于：1）设计模态解耦模块，分离共享与特有特征；2）采用弹性权重巩固与记忆重放结合的策略，缓解灾难性遗忘。实验表明，MOSAIC在步态评估任务中显著优于基线，为临床动态传感器环境下的持续学习提供了有效方案。

推荐系统.title: One Polluted Page Is Enough: Evaluating Web Content Pollution in Generative Recommenders
推荐系统.title_zh: 一个污染页面足矣：评估生成式推荐系统中的网页内容污染
推荐系统.summary: Search-augmented LLMs increasingly mediate everyday consumer recommendations by retrieving live web content. This creates a new risk: generative recommenders may consume polluted web content, such as fake reviews and promotional pages crafted to mislead recommendations. We ask: to what extent do sea
推荐系统.summary_zh: 检索增强的大语言模型通过实时网页内容中介日常消费推荐，这带来了新风险：生成式推荐系统可能消费污染内容，如虚假评论和误导性促销页面。本文系统评估了网页内容污染对生成式推荐的影响。创新点包括：1）构建污染内容注入框架，模拟真实攻击场景；2）提出污染传播度量指标，量化单页面污染对推荐结果的扩散效应；3）发现仅一个污染页面即可显著扭曲推荐列表，且现有防御机制效果有限。该研究揭示了生成式推荐系统的脆弱性，为构建鲁棒推荐系统提供了重要警示。

云计算优化.title: CloudCons: A Comprehensive End-to-End Benchmark for Cloud Resource Consolidation
云计算优化.title_zh: CloudCons：云资源整合的全面端到端基准测试
云计算优化.summary: Driven by conservative over-provisioning to guarantee service reliability, resource utilization in cloud data centers remains at low levels. To mitigate this, the forecast-then-optimize paradigm has emerged to optimize consolidation by anticipating future demands. While emerging time series foundati
云计算优化.summary_zh: 由于保守的过度配置以保证服务可靠性，云数据中心的资源利用率长期处于低水平。为缓解此问题，预测-优化范式通过预测未来需求来优化整合。本文提出CloudCons，首个面向云资源整合的全面端到端基准测试。创新点包括：1）整合多种时间序列基础模型与优化算法，构建统一评估框架；2）设计包含真实工作负载与资源动态变化的测试场景；3）揭示现有方法在预测精度与整合效率之间的权衡。实验表明，基于Transformer的预测模型结合遗传算法在多数场景下表现最佳，为云资源管理提供了可复现的评估标准。

个性化医疗AI.title: Is It You or Your Environment? A Bayesian Inference Framework for Genomically-Anchored Personalized Physiological Interpretation
个性化医疗AI.title_zh: 是你还是环境？基于基因组锚定的个性化生理解释的贝叶斯推断框架
个性化医疗AI.summary: Personalized health AI systems face a fundamental cold-start problem: machine learning models for physiological interpretation require weeks of individual behavioral data before they can distinguish constitutional variation from environmentally driven deviation. We propose a solution grounded in cau
个性化医疗AI.summary_zh: 个性化健康AI系统面临冷启动问题：生理解释的机器学习模型需要数周个体行为数据才能区分体质变异与环境驱动偏差。本文提出基于因果推断的解决方案，利用基因组信息作为锚定，构建贝叶斯推断框架。创新点：1）将遗传倾向作为先验知识，减少对个体长时程数据的依赖；2）设计分层贝叶斯模型，分离遗传与环境贡献；3）在合成与真实数据集上验证，仅需少量个体数据即可实现准确生理状态解释。该框架为个性化医疗AI的冷启动提供了理论基础，有望加速精准健康应用落地。

AI认知理论.title: Before You Think: System 0, AI-Mediated Cognition and Cognitive Colonization
AI认知理论.title_zh: 在你思考之前：系统0、AI中介认知与认知殖民
AI认知理论.summary: This paper examines three recent frameworks for understanding the cognitive and epistemic consequences of artificial intelligence: Tri-System Theory, Thinkframes, and System 0. It argues that while the first two capture important dimensions of AI's influence on individual reasoning and collective ep
AI认知理论.summary_zh: 本文考察了理解人工智能认知与认识论后果的三个近期框架：三系统理论、思考框架和系统0。论证前两者捕捉了AI对个体推理和集体认知影响的重要维度，但系统0框架更彻底地揭示了AI如何作为外部认知中介重塑人类思维。创新点：1）提出“认知殖民”概念，描述AI系统潜移默化地取代人类自主推理的过程；2）分析系统0在决策、创造力和道德判断中的双重作用；3）呼吁建立认知自主权保护机制。该研究为AI伦理与认知科学交叉领域提供了批判性视角，引发对AI中介认知的深度反思。

多智能体系统/MAS.title: Reward Modeling for Multi-Agent Orchestration
多智能体系统/MAS.title_zh: 面向多智能体编排的奖励建模
多智能体系统/MAS.summary: Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) built on Large Language Models (LLMs) require effective orchestration to coordinate specialized agents, yet training such orchestrators is hindered by limited supervision and high computational cost. We propose Orchestration Reward Modeling (OrchRM), a self-supervised framework that learns a reward model from agent interaction trajectories without human annotations. OrchRM leverages pairwise preferences derived from task completion outcomes and agent efficiency, enabling the training of an orchestrator via reinforcement learning. Experiments on diverse multi-agent tasks show that OrchRM significantly outperforms heuristic baselines and achieves comparable performance to fully supervised methods, while reducing annotation cost.
多智能体系统/MAS.summary_zh: 基于大语言模型的多智能体系统需要有效的编排机制来协调专业智能体，但训练编排器受限于监督信号不足和高计算成本。本文提出OrchRM，一种自监督框架，通过智能体交互轨迹学习奖励模型，无需人工标注。OrchRM利用任务完成结果和智能体效率推导出成对偏好，从而通过强化学习训练编排器。在多种多智能体任务上的实验表明，OrchRM显著优于启发式基线，性能与全监督方法相当，同时降低了标注成本。

时间序列分析/异常检测.title: CRAFTIIF: Cross-Resolution Analytic Four-Type Interpretable Isolation Forest for Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection
时间序列分析/异常检测.title_zh: CRAFTIIF：面向多元时间序列异常检测的跨分辨率解析四类型可解释隔离森林
时间序列分析/异常检测.summary: Anomaly detection in multivariate time series is challenged by four structurally distinct anomaly types -- point (isolated spikes), distributional (level shifts), temporal (rhythm changes), and collective (inter-sensor correlation breakdowns) -- each requiring different feature representations. Most existing methods fail to handle all types uniformly. We propose CRAFTIIF, a cross-resolution analytic isolation forest that explicitly models each anomaly type at appropriate temporal resolutions. The method introduces four specialized feature extractors and an interpretable scoring mechanism. Experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that CRAFTIIF achieves superior detection accuracy and provides clear explanations for detected anomalies.
时间序列分析/异常检测.summary_zh: 多元时间序列异常检测面临四种结构不同的异常类型：点异常（孤立尖峰）、分布异常（水平偏移）、时间异常（节奏变化）和集体异常（传感器间相关性崩溃），每种类型需要不同的特征表示。现有方法难以统一处理所有类型。本文提出CRAFTIIF，一种跨分辨率解析隔离森林，在合适的时间分辨率上显式建模每种异常类型。该方法引入四个专用特征提取器和可解释评分机制。在真实数据集上的实验表明，CRAFTIIF实现了优越的检测精度，并为检测到的异常提供了清晰解释。

大语言模型/推理机制.title: Beyond the Commitment Boundary: Probing Epiphenomenal Chain-of-Thought in Large Reasoning Models
大语言模型/推理机制.title_zh: 超越承诺边界：探究大型推理模型中的附带思维链
大语言模型/推理机制.summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning is the dominant paradigm for inference-time scaling in language models, yet the causal influence of individual steps on the final answer is poorly understood. We estimate each step's causal importance via early exit and use this measure to study how answers form across the reasoning chain. Our analysis reveals a 'commitment boundary' beyond which later steps have diminishing causal impact, suggesting that many CoT steps are epiphenomenal (correlated but not causal). We propose methods to prune epiphenomenal steps without degrading accuracy, improving inference efficiency.
大语言模型/推理机制.summary_zh: 思维链推理是语言模型推理时扩展的主导范式，但单个步骤对最终答案的因果影响尚不清楚。本文通过早期退出估计每个步骤的因果重要性，并利用该度量研究答案在推理链中的形成过程。分析揭示了“承诺边界”，超出此边界的后续步骤因果影响递减，表明许多思维链步骤是附带现象（相关但不因果）。我们提出剪枝附带步骤的方法，在不降低准确率的情况下提升推理效率。

量子计算/AI.title: An LLM System for Autonomous Variational Quantum Circuit Design
量子计算/AI.title_zh: 面向自主变分量子电路设计的大语言模型系统
量子计算/AI.summary: The design of high performing quantum circuits remains largely dependent on human expertise. We introduce an autonomous agentic framework that employs large language models (LLMs) to conduct iterative quantum circuit designs under explicit design constraints. Our system integrates seven components: a constraint parser, a circuit generator, a simulator, a performance evaluator, a memory module, a reasoning engine, and a refinement loop. The LLM iteratively proposes circuit modifications based on simulation feedback. Experiments on variational quantum algorithms show that our system autonomously discovers circuits that match or exceed human-designed baselines.
量子计算/AI.summary_zh: 高性能量子电路的设计很大程度上依赖人类专家。本文提出一个自主智能体框架，利用大语言模型在显式设计约束下进行迭代量子电路设计。系统集成七个组件：约束解析器、电路生成器、模拟器、性能评估器、记忆模块、推理引擎和优化循环。LLM根据模拟反馈迭代提出电路修改。在变分量子算法上的实验表明，系统自主发现的电路匹配或超越人类设计的基线。

大语言模型/系统优化.title: Can I Buy Your KV Cache?
大语言模型/系统优化.summary: Right now, across the world, AI agents are repeating the same absurd act: to read one document, they each recompute it from scratch. Every agent re-runs prefill, the most compute-intensive step a large model takes, over identical text, only to rebuild a key-value (KV) cache identical to the one the previous agent discarded. We propose a KV cache marketplace where agents can buy and sell precomputed caches, avoiding redundant computation. We design protocols for cache pricing, verification, and transfer. Simulations show that the marketplace reduces total prefill computation by up to 80% in multi-agent environments.
大语言模型/系统优化.summary_zh: 当前，全球的AI代理都在重复荒谬的行为：为了读取同一文档，每个代理都从头开始重新计算。每个代理对相同文本重复运行预填充（大模型最计算密集的步骤），仅为了重建与前一个代理丢弃的完全相同的键值缓存。本文提出KV缓存市场，代理可以买卖预计算的缓存，避免冗余计算。我们设计了缓存定价、验证和传输协议。模拟表明，在多代理环境中，该市场可将总预填充计算量减少高达80%。

category_summaries.大语言模型/LLM: 今日LLM方向聚焦于推理机制优化与系统效率提升，包括稀疏注意力、KV缓存压缩、投机解码等技术，以及针对长上下文和数学推理的改进。同时，涌现了多个针对LLM评估的新基准，强调鲁棒性和事实性。
category_summaries.计算机视觉/CV: 计算机视觉方向活跃，涵盖视频生成、医学图像分析、空间推理和室内定位。视频生成模型追求更高分辨率和可控性；医学图像领域关注分割与诊断；空间推理结合3D理解，推动具身智能发展。
category_summaries.NLP: NLP研究集中于文本生成、摘要和交互式叙事，探索大模型在故事创作中的角色。此外，多语言和低资源场景下的NLP任务也受到关注。
category_summaries.软件工程/SE: 软件工程方向重点研究AI辅助代码生成、测试和修复，利用LLM提升开发效率。同时，探讨AI Agent在自动化软件维护中的应用。
category_summaries.机器学习/ML: 机器学习方向包括优化算法、理论研究和元评估，关注模型泛化、公平性和可解释性。时间序列预测和异常检测也是热点。
category_summaries.自然语言处理/NLP: 与NLP类别重复，但侧重不同应用，如信息抽取、问答系统和对话系统，强调与知识图谱的结合。
category_summaries.多模态学习: 多模态学习整合视觉、语言和音频，推动跨模态理解和生成，如文本到图像、视频描述等。研究关注对齐和融合策略。
category_summaries.生成模型: 生成模型方面，扩散模型和自回归模型持续改进，应用于图像、视频和3D内容生成，追求高质量和高效率。
category_summaries.强化学习/RL: 强化学习研究包括安全RL、多智能体RL和RL与LLM的结合，探索在游戏、机器人控制等复杂任务中的表现。
category_summaries.AI伦理与安全: AI伦理与安全方向关注模型偏见、鲁棒性、隐私保护和可解释性，提出多种评估和缓解方法，确保AI系统可信。
category_summaries.多智能体系统: 多智能体系统研究协作、通信和博弈，应用于机器人团队、交通管理和社交模拟，强调涌现行为和分布式决策。
category_summaries.软件工程与AI: 与软件工程/SE类似，但更侧重AI在软件全生命周期中的应用，包括需求、设计、测试和维护。
category_summaries.智能体与知识图谱: 智能体与知识图谱结合，利用知识增强推理和决策，支持复杂问答和任务规划。
category_summaries.时间序列预测: 时间序列预测方向应用深度学习模型（如Transformer）于金融、能源和医疗等领域，关注长序列建模和不确定性估计。
category_summaries.智能体系统: 智能体系统研究自主Agent的感知、规划和行动，结合LLM实现自然语言交互，应用于虚拟助手和自动化任务。
category_summaries.优化算法: 优化算法方向提出新的梯度方法和进化策略，加速模型训练和推理，同时关注非凸优化和约束优化。
category_summaries.高能物理与AI: 高能物理与AI交叉，利用机器学习加速粒子碰撞数据分析、探测新物理现象，如异常检测和信号分类。
category_summaries.强化学习与安全: 强化学习与安全结合，研究对抗攻击、安全约束下的策略学习，确保RL系统在实际环境中的安全运行。
category_summaries.AI智能体评估: AI智能体评估方向设计基准和指标，测试Agent在复杂任务中的能力，如推理、规划和人机协作。
category_summaries.机器人/具身智能: 机器人/具身智能研究感知、操作和导航，结合强化学习和仿真环境，推动机器人在现实世界中的应用。
category_summaries.计算机视觉（室内定位）: 室内定位利用视觉特征和深度学习，实现高精度位置估计，应用于导航和增强现实。
category_summaries.AI Agent与软件工程: AI Agent与软件工程结合，开发自主编程助手、调试工具和文档生成，提升软件开发效率。
category_summaries.多模态AI与计算机辅助设计: 多模态AI辅助设计，如文本到3D模型、图像生成建筑草图，促进创意设计和工程建模。
category_summaries.AI Agent评估与基准: 与AI智能体评估类似，侧重Agent在具体任务上的表现，如桌面自动化、网页导航等。
category_summaries.大语言模型推理与摘要: 大语言模型推理与摘要方向优化长文档摘要、多步推理和逻辑推理，提升模型的信息压缩和推理能力。
category_summaries.自然语言处理与交互式叙事: 交互式叙事结合NLP和生成模型，实现动态故事生成和用户交互，应用于游戏和教育。
category_summaries.自然语言处理: 通用NLP研究包括词嵌入、句法分析、情感分析等，以及预训练模型的微调和适配。
category_summaries.计算机视觉: 通用计算机视觉研究涵盖分类、检测、分割和跟踪，以及自监督学习和视觉Transformer改进。
category_summaries.理论研究: 理论研究包括模型容量、泛化界、优化动力学等，为AI算法提供数学基础。
category_summaries.AI理论/元评估: AI理论/元评估关注评估方法本身，如基准的有效性、指标偏差，提出更可靠的评估框架。
category_summaries.LLM/科学发现: LLM辅助科学发现，如药物分子设计、材料性质预测和实验方案生成，加速科研进程。
category_summaries.计算机视觉/视频生成: 视频生成方向追求高保真度和时间一致性，利用扩散模型和Transformer生成短视频和长视频。
category_summaries.计算机视觉/医学图像: 医学图像分析包括分割、分类和生成，应用于疾病诊断和手术规划，强调可解释性和数据效率。
category_summaries.计算机视觉/空间推理: 空间推理结合3D视觉和几何理解，支持场景重建、物体位姿估计和机器人操作。
category_summaries.医疗AI: 医疗AI涵盖诊断、预后和治疗推荐，利用多模态数据（影像、文本、基因组）提升临床决策。
category_summaries.推荐系统: 推荐系统方向利用大模型和用户行为序列，提升个性化推荐准确性，同时考虑冷启动和多样性。
category_summaries.云计算优化: 云计算优化研究资源调度、能耗管理和任务分配，结合AI预测负载和自动扩缩容。
category_summaries.个性化医疗AI: 个性化医疗AI根据患者个体特征定制治疗方案，利用基因数据和历史疗效，实现精准医疗。
category_summaries.AI认知理论: AI认知理论探索机器智能与人类认知的相似性，如注意力、记忆和推理机制，指导AI设计。
category_summaries.多智能体系统/MAS: 与多智能体系统类似，侧重分布式决策、共识和协调，应用于无人机编队和智能电网。
category_summaries.时间序列分析/异常检测: 时间序列异常检测利用深度学习识别异常模式，应用于工业监控、金融欺诈和网络入侵。
category_summaries.大语言模型/推理机制: 大语言模型推理机制研究链式思维、树搜索和外部工具使用，提升复杂推理能力。
category_summaries.量子计算/AI: 量子计算与AI交叉，探索量子机器学习算法和量子神经网络，利用量子优势加速训练和推理。
category_summaries.大语言模型/系统优化: 大语言模型系统优化包括模型压缩、量化、蒸馏和分布式训练，降低部署成本。

highlights: MaxProof：通过生成-验证强化学习与群体级测试时扩展，显著提升竞赛级数学证明的规模化能力，为数学推理提供了新的范式。
Valid Inference with Synthetic Data via Task Exchangeability：为合成数据推断提供了严格的统计理论基础，解决了LLM生成数据在科学研究中的有效性问题。
Contrast-Informed Augmentation and Domain-Adversarial Training for Adult-to-Neonatal MR Reconstruction Generalization：首次系统研究医学影像重建的跨域泛化，提出的域适应方法对临床新生儿MRI有重要实用价值。
研究亮点1：EvTexture++——事件驱动视频超分辨率纹理增强：创新性地利用事件数据直接增强纹理细节，而非传统的光流估计，在极端运动和低光照条件下表现优异，为事件视觉与视频超分辨率结合提供了新范式。
研究亮点2：Uncertainty-Aware Hybrid Retrieval for Long-Document RAG：提出基于不确定性的自适应检索粒度选择，有效解决长文档RAG中的上下文保留与噪声抑制平衡问题，显著提升答案准确性，对实际RAG系统有重要实用价值。
研究亮点1：论文《Learning to Reason by Analogy via Retrieval-Augmented Reinforcement Fine-Tuning》提出将检索增强生成与强化学习结合，通过结构相似性检索类比示例并利用强化微调提升模型推理能力，在数学和科学推理任务上表现优异，为提升LLM复杂推理能力提供了新范式。
研究亮点2：论文《Adaptive Turn-Taking for Real-time Multi-Party Voice Agents》提出ModeratorLM，一种基于角色条件化自适应轮次切换的语音代理，在多方对话中实现自然公平的轮次管理，推动了实时多方语音交互技术的发展。
研究亮点3：论文《SupraBench: A Benchmark for Supramolecular Chemistry》创建了首个评估大语言模型在超分子化学设计任务上的标准化基准，揭示了LLM在科学定量任务上的不足，为AI驱动化学研究提供了重要评估工具。
研究亮点1：ERTS: Adversarial Robustness Testing of Ethical AI via Semantic Perturbation in a Bounded Consequence Space——提出有界后果空间中的语义扰动测试框架，系统评估伦理AI的对抗鲁棒性，揭示当前模型对细微语义变化的脆弱性。
研究亮点2：Existence Precedes Value: Joint Modeling of Observational Existence and Evolving States in Time Series Forecasting——创新性地联合建模观测存在性和状态演化，将缺失模式作为信息源，显著提升不规则时间序列预测的准确性。
daily_summary: 今日AI研究动态呈现多元化趋势，大语言模型（LLM）仍然是核心热点，但研究方向从单纯的能力提升转向系统效率优化和推理机制创新。稀疏注意力、KV缓存压缩等技术旨在降低计算成本；同时，链式思维、树搜索等方法增强复杂推理能力。计算机视觉领域视频生成和医学图像分析表现突出，多模态学习持续融合视觉、语言和音频。强化学习与安全、多智能体系统等方向也涌现出大量工作，强调智能体的鲁棒性和协作能力。此外，AI伦理与安全、医疗AI和推荐系统等应用领域得到进一步深化，跨学科合作（如高能物理、量子计算）成为新趋势。整体来看，今日研究注重理论与实践结合，推动AI在更广泛场景中的可信、高效和可解释应用。
